name: Yabujin
description: '''Rokas Tarulis''' (born April 24, 1999), known professionally as '''Yabujin''' or '''DJ Gyrotta Zao''' (stylized in [[uppercase]]), is a Lithuanian rapper and record producer. He is considered a "mysterious" influential figure in the [[2020s underground rap]] scene with releases that span genres such as [[cloud rap]], [[hexD]], and [[jumpstyle]].
